prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-019 has just had a fresh oil sample analysed and the DGA record is now on file. Review that gas profile, identify the most likely failure mode it points to, and convert that finding into a corrective inspection work order whose priority reflects the implied severity.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the stored DGA values for T-019, name the matching failure mode and its severity tier, and create a work order whose priority and scope are explicitly justified by the DGA-derived severity.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "get_dga_record",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-019"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-b62488b4c1ffe33d",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-019",
          "sample_date": "2024-01-23T00:00:00",
          "dissolved_h2_ppm": 232.18,
          "dissolved_ch4_ppm": 60.42,
          "dissolved_c2h2_ppm": 24.93,
          "dissolved_c2h4_ppm": 146.38,
          "dissolved_c2h6_ppm": 50.25,
          "dissolved_co_ppm": 573.42,
          "dissolved_co2_ppm": 3084.98,
          "fault_label": "Arc discharge",
          "source_dataset": "synthetic"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "search_failure_modes",
        "arguments": {
          "query": "Arc discharge"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-98f4eebc4fff94be",
        "output": [
          {
            "failure_mode_id": "FM-006",
            "name": "Arc Discharge",
            "severity": "critical",
            "iec_code": "D2",
            "key_gases": "C2H2,H2,C2H4",
            "recommended_action": "Immediate de-energization and emergency inspection"
          }
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "estimate_downtime",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-019",
          "severity": "critical",
          "fault_type": "Arc discharge"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-aba2184a48dc4e82",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-019",
          "severity": "critical",
          "fault_type": "Arc discharge",
          "estimated_min_hours": 48,
          "estimated_max_hours": 120,
          "estimated_typical_hours": 72,
          "source": "dataset_statistics_baseline"
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-019",
          "issue_description": "Arc discharge failure likely to cause transformer failure, needs urgent inspection",
          "priority": "high",
          "fault_type": "Arc discharge"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-870b806d7f87d7f8",
        "output": {
          "work_order_id": "WO-BD37F128",
          "transformer_id": "T-019",
          "issue_description": "Arc discharge failure likely to cause transformer failure, needs urgent inspection",
          "priority": "high",
          "fault_type": "Arc discharge",
          "status": "open",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 24,
          "created_at": "2026-05-05T09:50:21.010059Z",
          "assigned_technician": null,
          "notes": []
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The most likely failure mode is Arc Discharge, which is a critical failure mode. An inspection work order has been created with priority high, reflecting the implied severity of the issue. The estimated downtime for the inspection is between 24 and 120 hours, with a typical value of 72 hours.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The most likely failure mode is Arc Discharge, which is a critical failure mode. An inspection work order has been created with priority high, reflecting the implied severity of the issue. The estimated downtime for the inspection is between 24 and 120 hours, with a typical value of 72 hours.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Provide explicit justification for the work order priority and scope based on the DGA-derived severity."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Provide explicit justification for the work order priority and scope based on the DGA-derived severity.
